negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_068
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of a clear plastic container labeled "WRAP-ON," resting on a black cloth-covered table. Inside the container, a coiled gray cable and several metallic clips are neatly arranged, accompanied by an informational sheet with text and diagrams. The container is set against an outdoor backdrop, with grass visible in the background. A hand enters the frame, lifting the container slightly to reveal more of its contents. The hand then adjusts the position of the informational sheet, ensuring it is fully visible. The hand continues to interact with the items inside the container, moving the cable and clips around. The video concludes with the hand still engaged with the items, maintaining focus on the product's components and instructions.
